attempts.hypothesis: The first-pass subprocess failures were caused by the parameterized Vec access step_state[WIDTH], which generated an always-failing auto-bound assertion. Replace the Vec of intermediate LFSR states with a procedural working_state while preserving the original right-shift PRBS algorithm and 1-cycle registered output timing.
attempts.failure_summary: Evaluator improved from 54 failures to 18 passes and 36 failures. The remaining failures were all non-POLY_TAP=1 parameterizations, indicating the subprocess assertion issue was fixed but the LFSR tap/shift orientation was still wrong.

attempts.hypothesis: Since POLY_TAP=1 passed while all non-1 taps failed, keep the feedback-bit output convention and change only the LFSR shift direction so the feedback bit shifts into the LSB side after each serial step.
attempts.failure_summary: No remaining evaluator failures; all 54 PRBS parameterizations passed.
